title: Stemmacantha imatongensis
taxonomy: Stemmacantha imatongensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the tribe Cardueae and the genus Stemmacantha. This plant is native to Borneo and is considered to be an endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors. Further classification at the species level places it within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This classification reflects the plant's botanical identity and its position within the plant kingdom.
